languages.text: "Мы заметили странные сигналы на поверхности, Ваша Светлость. Запрашиваю разрешение на направленное авгурирование".
"We have detected strange signals on the surface, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Requesting permission to conduct a targeted augur scan."
languages.original_text: "Мы заметили странные сигналы на поверхности, Ваша Светлость. Запрашиваю разрешение на направленное авгурирование".

traits.locale_text: "We have detected strange signals on the surface, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Requesting permission to conduct a targeted augur scan."
"We have detected strange signals on the surface, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Requesting permission to conduct a targeted augur scan."

"We have detected strange signals on the surface, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Requesting permission to conduct a targeted augur scan. A message has also been received from the Choirmaster of the Astropathic Choir."
"We have detected strange signals on the surface, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Requesting permission to conduct a targeted augur scan."
"We have detected strange signals on the surface, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Requesting permission to conduct a targeted augur scan."

languages.text: 「表面で奇妙な信号を検知しました、御{mf|主|女}様。標的を絞ったアウグス・スキャンを行う許可を願います。また、アストロパシック・コーアのコーラスマスターからのメッセージも受信しました」
languages.original_text: "We have detected strange signals on the surface, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Requesting permission to conduct a targeted augur scan. A message has also been received from the Choirmaster of the Astropathic Choir."

languages.text: "Yüzeyde tuhaf sinyaller tespit ettik {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Hedefli bir alamet taraması yapmak için izin talep ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "We have detected strange signals on the surface, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Requesting permission to conduct a targeted augur scan."

traits.locale_text: "Yüzeyde tuhaf sinyaller tespit ettik {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Hedefli bir alamet taraması yapmak için izin talep ediyorum."

languages.text: “大人，我们探测到地表有一些异常信号。请求准许进行定向俄歇矩阵扫描。”
languages.original_text: "We have detected strange signals on the surface, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Requesting permission to conduct a targeted augur scan."

traits.locale_text: “大人，我们探测到地表有一些异常信号。请求准许进行定向俄歇矩阵扫描。”

languages.text: "Wir haben auf der Oberfläche seltsame Signale geortet, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Erbitte Erlaubnis für einen gezielten Augurenscan."
languages.original_text: "We have detected strange signals on the surface, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Requesting permission to conduct a targeted augur scan."

traits.locale_text: "Wir haben auf der Oberfläche seltsame Signale geortet, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Erbitte Erlaubnis für einen gezielten Augurenscan."

languages.text: « Nos augures ont détecté d'étranges signaux à la surface, Votre Seigneurie. Demandons l'autorisation de procéder à une analyse ciblée. »
languages.original_text: "We have detected strange signals on the surface, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Requesting permission to conduct a targeted augur scan."

traits.locale_text: « Nos augures ont détecté d'étranges signaux à la surface, Votre Seigneurie. Demandons l'autorisation de procéder à une analyse ciblée. »

languages.text: «Hemos detectado señales extrañas en la superficie, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Solicito permiso para realizar un escaneo de augur en la zona».
languages.original_text: "We have detected strange signals on the surface, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Requesting permission to conduct a targeted augur scan."

traits.locale_text: «Hemos detectado señales extrañas en la superficie, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Solicito permiso para realizar un escaneo de augur en la zona».
